description_long: This object consists of three wooden barrels of varying sizes and colors, arranged on a circular patch of sandy ground. Each barrel is constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by metal hoops, with visible wood grain and some signs of wear. Two of the barrels have lighter colored bands, while the third is darker and more uniformly colored. Scattered around the barrels are several wooden planks and two round, flat wooden lids or coasters, suggesting the barrels may be used for storage or transport. The barrels are open at the top, revealing hollow interiors, and there are no visible handles. The overall scene evokes a rustic, utilitarian feel, suitable for outdoor or semi-industrial urban settings.
description: A group of three open wooden barrels with metal hoops, set on sandy ground with scattered planks and lids. The barrels vary in color and size, showing a rustic, worn appearance.
description_view_0: One barrel is upright in the center, with two round lids and a pile of wooden planks nearby.
description_view_1: All three barrels are visible side by side, showing their different colors and metal banding, with planks leaning against the leftmost barrel.
description_view_2: The barrels are seen from the back, with the lighter-banded barrel in the foreground and lids arranged in a line.
description_view_3: The three barrels are aligned, with all lids clearly visible in front and a plank pile behind the rightmost barrel.
